description: Get into the festive spirit with this bulk pack of 100 classic Santa hats! Perfect for large gatherings, office parties, school events, or community celebrations, these traditional red and white felt hats bring instant Christmas cheer to any occasion. Each hat features the iconic conical design with a bright red body and white trim, capturing the essence of Father Christmas's beloved headwear. The soft felt material offers comfortable wear for adults and children alike, making these hats ideal for holiday photographs, festive performances, or simply spreading seasonal joy. Whether you're organising a corporate Christmas party, planning a school celebration, or hosting a large family gathering, this bulk pack ensures everyone can participate in the yuletide fun. These lightweight, easy-to-store hats are a practical choice for event planners and organisations looking to create a unified festive atmosphere.
